query: Piancavallo Nordic Marathon cross country ski race Piancavallo

videos.description:
Diego Svalduz, president of the  LOC local organizing Committee in the world Championships of Alpago and Piancavallo 2017 makes a balance of the first (foggy) day of the international event.
"Today we run an Individual race very much on the edge. It was an hard challenge, both for snow and weather conditions. In the end we received compliments from teams and athletes because it was definetely not easy to set a track in such conditions. I think that the experience of 34 years of Transcavallo race paid off, and - if I may say -, I regard this as a small victory of the Loc, among the big performances carried out by the athletes" Champs and emotions still go on!
